repair_candidate.summary: Repair #90019 by refreshing the contributor branch onto current main and fixing the failing build-artifacts and runtime topology architecture checks without broadening the memory-search fallback change.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repairs contributor PR #90019 while preserving attribution to @sahibzada-allahyar.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90019
Cluster: live-pr-inventory-20260617T075124-013

Scope:
- Refresh the memory-search periodic sync fallback branch onto current main.
- Keep explicit intervalMinutes values, including 0 opt-out.
- Keep the interval fallback dirty-before-sync behavior.
- Fix the failing build-artifacts and runtime topology architecture checks with the narrowest possible changes.

Validation:
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm test -- extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager-sync-ops.interval.test.ts
- pnpm test -- src/agents/memory-search.test.ts
